title: ferrotorch-core: erfinv f32 Winitzki rational approx residual — surfaced by phase 2.5 (#767)
description: Phase 2.5 conformance probe shows special::erfinv at f32 deviates from PyTorch by ~1.3e-4 absolute, exceeding F32_TRANSCENDENTAL_CPU = 1e-5. Root cause: src/special.rs uses Winitzki (2008) rational approximation. To close: wire a higher-precision routine (Boost-style or libm) or accept and document the divergence with a relaxed erfinv-specific tolerance.
